response.justification: Szabo exceeds the 15-year experience floor and brings diverse technical depth, but falls short of principal-level expectations. While the recent re:cinq role signals AI-agent infrastructure interest, the resume lacks demonstrated strategic impact, director-level responsibilities, or products built with AI. Most roles are senior/staff IC without evidence of thought leadership, technical strategy partnerships, or enterprise-scale innovation. The candidate could grow into this role but needs to substantiate AI expertise and executive-presence contributions.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with ~20 years of continuous software engineering across multiple domains
Strong founder/entrepreneur experience with GISCollective, demonstrating ability to drive platforms from concept to production
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work at re:cinq shows emerging alignment with cutting-edge AI tooling
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI expertise—only recent re:cinq role mentions AI/agentic workflows; prior 19 years focused on web, GIS, data integration
No director-level or principal IC titles; all roles are senior/staff engineer with no evidence of strategic partnerships or technical leadership beyond individual contribution
Missing preferred qualifications: no Master's or PhD in AI-related field, and previous entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) appears to be open-source hobby project, not commercial venture
